member.name: M:fixDate.interfaces.IDateMatch.FindDateFormatMatch(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.SortedList{System.Int32,System.String})
member.summary: tries to find the last date pattern in a string and returns only the date/time part
member.param: list of patterns to try to match file name against, the order ist inmportant

member.name: M:fixDate.interfaces.IDateMatch.TryCleaningUpFilename(System.String)
member.summary: try to clean away characters the are not needed but stop date matching

member.name: M:haha.Program.Main(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.param: force update file date even if it is already correct
relative path where to find documents to check, default is current path
